commandResults.command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_ingestion_scheduler_ledger.py backend/tests/test_ats_source_service.py && bun test tests/job-ingestion-audit.test.ts apps/worker/test/scheduler.test.ts

rows.suspected_failure: JSearch advances the rotation beyond partitions never attempted after an error.
rows.expected_behavior: failed/aborted slices retain the cursor so unattempted partitions remain scheduled
rows.actual_behavior: rate-limit abort fixture retains cursor and records partial completeness
rows.root_cause: cursor_next used planned query count rather than completed terminal partitions
rows.proposed_fix: advance only when every planned partition reaches a complete terminal state

rows.suspected_failure: All Workday board failures are reported as legitimate zero results.
rows.expected_behavior: failed, partial_failure and no_results are distinct states
rows.actual_behavior: all-board failure fixture returns status=failed with board error
rows.root_cause: board exception wrapper returned an empty list without error state
rows.proposed_fix: preserve per-board terminal errors and derive aggregate status

rows.suspected_failure: France Travail pagination can silently complete after repeated pages or a local maximum.
rows.expected_behavior: repeated, empty-intermediate, source-total mismatch and local-cap states are non-success
rows.root_cause: loop termination did not carry an explicit completeness state
rows.proposed_fix: fail closed with pagination metadata and exact source-total reconciliation

rows.expected_behavior: live accessible totals reconcile to exact IDs

blocker.dependency: read-only provider credentials plus active plan documentation
blocker.unblockProcedure: run the audit with read-only provider credentials and archive response total/range metadata

rows.suspected_failure: Direct ATS adapters slice at a local limit without exposing whether more source rows exist.
rows.affected_path: Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, Recruitee, Personio and Teamtailor adapters
rows.expected_behavior: limit+1/cursor evidence produces complete or capped terminal status
rows.actual_behavior: list-compatible batches carry explicit completeness; limit+1 and SmartRecruiters hard-cap fixtures produce capped_needs_split
rows.root_cause: adapter return type carries rows only and loses truncation state
rows.proposed_fix: thread list-compatible batch completeness through source refresh; cap hits are terminal capped errors and never silent success

blocker.dependency: read-only live board inventory with a source-reported total or independently enumerable board
blocker.unblockProcedure: provide a read-only board key in DIRECT_ATS_AUDIT_SOURCE, run the adapter beyond its cap, and archive exact external-ID reconciliation

rows.expected_behavior: every partition has a distinct terminal state
rows.proposed_fix: versioned manifest and cap-hit non-success state

rows.suspected_failure: Filters discard jobs without stable reasons.
rows.expected_behavior: stage counts reconcile by stable reason

rows.suspected_failure: Partner, contract, geography and occupation branches are not fully observed.
rows.expected_behavior: authoritative live provider x contract x geography x occupation matrix
rows.actual_behavior: local planned matrix exists; authoritative live metadata unavailable

blocker.dependency: provider metadata and anonymized paying-cohort aggregates
blocker.unblockProcedure: export read-only DATABASE_URL and provider metadata snapshots, then rerun coverage evaluator

rows.suspected_failure: Partial runs can drive stale invalidation and cutoff-free purge.
rows.expected_behavior: absence mutation requires explicit complete snapshot
rows.root_cause: maintenance had no completed-run proof input
rows.proposed_fix: explicit completeness gate and deletion fallback removal

rows.suspected_failure: Fuzzy deduplication can destroy distinct openings.
rows.expected_behavior: provider+external ID stays canonical; fuzzy matches are review-only
rows.actual_behavior: production occurrence, canonical URL, ATS ID and fingerprint classifiers pass with zero false merges and zero missed candidates

rows.reproduction_command: .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q backend/tests/test_ingestion_scheduler_ledger.py backend/tests/test_ats_source_service.py && bun test tests/job-ingestion-audit.test.ts apps/worker/test/scheduler.test.ts
rows.expected_behavior: run/partition counters, missed/stale/zero/drop alerts and idempotency are durable
rows.actual_behavior: authoritative Python loops claim deterministic durable occurrences, reject duplicate-process claims, persist terminal summaries, and expose alert predicates
rows.root_cause: in-process loops had no durable stage/partition accounting
rows.proposed_fix: narrow service-role claim/complete RPCs over the existing ledger; no writer transfer

rows.suspected_failure: Feed offset pagination and ingestion SQL degrade at representative cardinality.
rows.expected_behavior: five-sample result digest and plan distribution

blocker.dependency: read-only representative Postgres connection and product SLO
blocker.unblockProcedure: provide read-only staging URL, execute five EXPLAIN ANALYZE samples, compare ordered-ID digest

rows.suspected_failure: PostgREST offset pages are unstable on identical imported_at values and silently stop at 10k.
rows.expected_behavior: unique tie-breaker ordering and an explicit error at the read ceiling
rows.actual_behavior: job_id tie-breaker and cap-surfacing fixtures pass; phone-ready feed fixture passes
rows.root_cause: imported_at-only ordering was non-unique and MAX_READ_ROWS termination was indistinguishable from exhaustion
rows.proposed_fix: append deterministic job_id ordering, raise on ceiling, and repair stale phone fixture only
